title: Missing Subitem Column
excerpt: When I create a new board, I cannot find how to add a subitem column the the board.  What am I missing?

posts.author: briennemartin (Brienne Martin)
posts.cookedHtml: When I create a new board, I cannot find how to add a subitem column the the board. What am I missing?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m not 100% sure the sub-items feature has been released to all accounts as it is in “beta”.

If it is active on yours, just right click on the name column of one of the items.

If not, just send a request to support@monday.com and get it turned on.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @briennemartin Welcome back to the community

@JCorrell thanks for jumping in here!

You can add the subitems column from the item menu, and you can also find more information about Subitems in this helpful article from our Knowledge Base:
All About Subitems (Beta)

But basically, you can add the column like this:

-Alex
